programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: When the Municipal Corporation puts a hold on Sachin Tichkule's payment, a berk but ambitious municipal contractor, he decides to sue them. But matters worsen when the new municipal commissioner turns out to be his former girlfriend.

programme.title: Guddu Ki Gun
programme.desc: A washing powder salesman, Guddu, finds himself in a quandary when his girlfriend's grandfather casts a spell on him after he ditches her. Guddu must now find true love and stay loyal to her in order to get rid of the curse.

programme.title: Agnipankh
programme.desc: Three Indian Air Force pilots are captured and taken captive by Pakistani troops. While in jail, they meet other Indians and plan a jailbreak.

programme.title: Ishq Vishk
programme.desc: Shahid Kapoor, Amrita Rao, Shenaz Treasury, Vishal Malhotra, Kapil Zaveri, Shabhir, Deepti Gujral, Saundarya

programme.title: Operation Java
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Navagrah
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Nayaki
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Tehkikaat 2
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: If is a Big Word
programme.desc: It seems to the 35-year-old Yekaterina Kolesnikova that her life got on to the wrong track: instead of being a model on the catwalk in Milan she works in a factory making working clothes. And her husband, a once brilliant and talented musician, has turned out to be a local finance officer. But now Fate suddenly gives Katya a chance to go back seventeen years and try to change her life. Will it make her happy?

programme.title: Dandelion
programme.desc: Two of the most prosperous families in town – the Adrianovs and the Zeldovs - are preparing for the marriage of their children, an advantageous match and a union that promises to benefit both families' business interests. The day before the wedding celebrations are due to commence, the groom, Rodion Andrianov, meets a plain ‘dandelion' blonde girl Sonia under unusual circumstances when the elevator in which they are both traveling suddenly breaks down.

programme.title: Terror Of Hallow'S Eve
programme.desc: After a fifteen-year-old is brutally beaten up by High School bullies, his wish for revenge unknowingly unleashes the Terror of Halloween.

programme.title: Ouija House
programme.desc: A girl takes her friends to a house with a dark past for a research project. They unwittingly summon an evil entity with plans of its own who makes the house part of its sinister game.

programme.title: Personal Interest
programme.desc: Tatiana makes her escape from prison and seeks a hideout in a remote village of Pavlovka, in her late grandmother's house. There she meets Maxim who has come to the village to take a break from the hectic city life. Instant chemistry sparks between them. Everything would be just fine were it not for Tatiana's ex-boyfriend, Oleg, who comes to the village looking for her. Tatiana is forced to tell Maxim the whole truth about herself. She tells him about the robbery she committed together with Oleg and how she took all the blame on herself and then escaped from prison. Maxim assures her that he will be by her side no matter what and will help her get through all this.

programme.title: Lady Gaga: Encore
programme.desc: Gaga has travelled through time with her ever changing sound, reinventing herself for every album.

programme.title: Britney Spears: Unbreakable
programme.desc: Look into the glamorous and tumultuous life of pop sensation Britney Spears.

programme.title: Liar
programme.desc: A well-dressed man, John is in a dingy interrogation room being given a lie detector test by detectives.

programme.title: Lady Gaga: Encore
programme.desc: Gaga has travelled through time with her ever changing sound, reinventing herself for every album.

programme.title: Britney Spears: Unbreakable
programme.desc: Look into the glamorous and tumultuous life of pop sensation Britney Spears.

programme.title: Beyonce: Beyond the Glam
programme.desc: Beyonce is a true global mega star and is synonymous with talent and success.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Ki-joon and Hee-yeol become best friends at the police academy, despite differences in their personality. During their outing, they witness a kidnapping incident and report it to the police right away. However, because of the lack of evidence, the investigation doesn't progress while precious time is being wasted. Ki-joon and Hee-yeol decide to take the investigation into their own hands. The only problem is they have zero experience in a real investigation.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: The Final Countdown
programme.desc: A modern aircraft carrier is thrown back in time to 1941 near Hawaii, just hours before the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: Hello Hum Lallan Bol Rahe Hain
programme.desc: Lallan, a security guard, loves Saroja, who is supposed to get married to an older man for money. However, while convincing her to change her mind, he finds out another shocking fact about her.

programme.title: Paagalpan
programme.desc: Young and attractive Roma Pinto is the only girl in the struggling Pinto family, consisting of five brothers who are all very protective of their sister. When Roma meets Sameer Malhotra they fall in love and wish to be married, but Sameer's father will not let him marry a poor girl and Roma's brothers will not let her get close to anyone.

programme.title: Love Sex Aur Dhoka
programme.desc: An Indian anthology film that tells three separate but interconnected stories revolving around the themes of love, sex, and betrayal. The film is shot in a found-footage style, utilizing surveillance cameras, mobile phones, and webcams to capture the stories of individuals from different backgrounds, whose lives are intertwined in unexpected ways. It explores the dark side of relationships and the impact of technology on modern romance.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 15
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 14
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Bust Ep 11
programme.desc: The bumbling but lovable Bear Brothers are back, and Logger Vick remains in hot pursuit! Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 11
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 11
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 12
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It' s a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It' s countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer' s back is turned.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase' s father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Cindrella Ep 21
programme.desc: Young Cinderella, struggling with abuse from her stepmother and stepsisters, receives help from her fairy godmother and animal friends while finding adventure and romance with a dashing man who hides the fact that he is a prince.

programme.title: Jungle Book Ep 46
programme.desc: This story is about, " The adventures of Mowgli, an orphan boy raised by wolves, and his friends in the jungle." Young Mowglu and his animal friends, Bagheera and Baloo, adventur together in the wilderness.

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: Hotel manager Hartacker tries to intimidate the crocodiles with a ghost show. But they see through his evil plan...

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: Milly is supposed to look after Humperdink the hamster for the weekend. Black Cat, however, reacts a little jealously and soon makes sure that the hamster disappears. Now Milly and Sam try to find the little creepy-crawly, but it is only when Milly invents a hamster search engine that they are successful. Humperdink is back, and Black Cat now knows that she has no reason to be jealous.

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: Phaedon just can't let it go. Time and again, he betrays and betrays the elves. Now he has hatched a particularly devious plan...

programme.title: Shadow of the Elves
programme.desc: Phaedon just can't let it go. Time and again, he betrays and betrays the elves. Now he has hatched a particularly devious plan...

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: Someone is dumping toxic waste into the sea! Monty has fallen ill from the toxic waste and has red spots all over him. Bob and his friends have to prevent others from getting infected...

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: Some aliens have tracked down a boom cart. But the module has been stolen. The thieves have only left their initials behind: G.G. The Da Boom crew must track down the mysterious thieves...

programme.title: Adventurers Masters of Time
programme.desc: The hacker tries to prevent Magellan from sailing around the world.

programme.title: Gloria s House
programme.desc: Gloria and her friend Millicent spend a day at a large amusement park. They have a lot of fun together until they lose sight of each other...

programme.title: Shadow of the Elves
programme.desc: Lord Kann gives Snakehammer an ultimatum. The scatterbrained inventor must finally come up with something tangible...

programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show
programme.desc: While fishing, a ghost ship suddenly emerges from the fog and rams the friends' boat the children now have to help the captain. / Prof. Knox has accidentally shrunk himself in a self-experiment and tries to get F&F's attention. / &F have a new computer game, but Lupo does everything wrong and eventually all three of them are drawn into the game / Dad drinks too much coffee and has to cut back for health reasons. Mom knows her husband and has prepared everything so that he can't get coffee anywhere in the city. It all ends up in the coffee factory...

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: When Milly takes her clothes into the kitchen to wash them, her father notices that Milly is missing some stockings. He asks her to look for them in her room. To make the search easier, Milly uses her father's clothes color selector. She soon realizes that the clothes colour selector is also great for finding stockings. The professor is also amazed and realizes once again what a wonderful daughter he has.

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: When Crocadoo runs out of food, crocodile Jazz looks for a job. Hotel manager Hartacker actually hires him as an assistant cook. In the meantime, surveyors turn up at the crocodiles...

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: Master Namdrah captures the Da Boom Crew's ship. When he discovers that the kids have hidden their Boom Carts in Dant, he takes him with him. Now the kids have to free him again...

programme.desc: Lord Kann gives Snakehammer an ultimatum. The scatterbrained inventor must finally come up with something tangible...

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: Bob tries to get home in a homemade submarine. But suddenly a purple fog appears. Only the ink gang can be behind it!

programme.title: Adventurers Masters of Time
programme.desc: This time, the time travelers find themselves in the Florence of Leonardo Da Vinci.

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: Mr. Hartacker wants to chase the crocodiles off their land. He wants to build a leisure center there. He cunningly uses a noise machine...

programme.title: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik
programme.desc: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik: A Show That Explores Indian Mythology In A Manner Never Attempted Before. Renowned Mythologist Devdutt Pattanaik Dips Into Subjects Through Lesser-Known Tales And Narratives, While Attempting To Explore And Interpret The Questions That Arise From The Treasure Trove That Is Indian Mythology. With An Easy And Unassuming Storytelling Style. Devdutt Pattanalk Demystifies Mythology In Easy-To-Understand, Everyday Language In This Unique Series That Brings Ancient Stories To Life In A Contemporary Context. Each Episode Takes Viewers On A Fantastic Voyage Through Myriad Characters, Events, Stories, Symbols, And Rituals That Form The Basis Of Identity For The People Of The Subcontinent.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: The Fall of Dhaka
programme.desc: The 1971 war with Pakistan was a quasi total war fought on both the eastern and western fronts across many battle theatres that led to decisive results. It broke Pakistan in two and helped the new state of Bangladesh to emerge on the global stage. It entailed a march on the capital of Dacca Dhaka, enforced regime change and the mass surrender of approximately 93,000 prisoners of war. The Indian political leadership displayed a singleminded and coldblooded pursuit of national interests. The leadership of all three Service chiefs was inspiring and highly professional. This film puts spotlight on the charismatic leaders who won the war for us and records the bravery sacrifice of our brave young officers and jawans.

programme.title: Turning point at Tololing (Kargil War)
programme.desc: Turning Point At Tololing Is A Documentary By General Gd Bakshi Detailing Indian Armys First Major Win During The Kargil War Of 1999. India Was Caught Unawares By The Sudden Offensive By The Pakistani Army While The Then Pm Atal Bihari Vajpayee Was Engaging In Peace Talks With Nawaz Sharif. How Did The Indian Army Fight Back This Sudden And Aggressive Attack By The Enemy In The Unforgiving Himalayan Terrain Recapturing Tololing Peak Was A Major Turning Point, Which Eventually Ensured Indias Victory In One The Toughest Wars Fought By The Indian Army In Postindependence India.

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. programme.desc: It's man versus nature in a race against time. Heart-pounding rescues captured on camera in these viral weather videos.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: In these viral videos we witness how, in the blink of an eye, your day can become suddenly dangerous. Even on a beautiful day, when you're not expecting any severe weather at all, Mother Nature can sometimes be malicious and sneaky

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: In this episode we show some of the most extreme winter weather ever caught on camera, including a first-hand look at being buried by an avalanche.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Mother Nature unleashes some of her most deadly forces to wreak havoc in the air and unexpectedly terrify her victims.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Mother Nature isn't messing around and she's back with even more of the craziest weather clips assembled. From the shores of Florida, to the outback of Australia, we've traveled the world to collect these videos, and each one is designed to blow you away.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Early September of 2008 saw radical imagery on the hurricane maps of the Atlantic – four named tropical storms, swirling in a train across the ocean. “Angry Planet” was there as three of them made landfall as hurricanes in the US.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Possibly the home of the deadly Marberg Ebola virus, Kitum Cave is high on Mt.Elgon straddling the Kenya-Uganda border. When host George Kourounis gets bitten by one of the bats…well, you'll have to see the show to find out what happens.

programme.title: Science of Sound
programme.desc: Professional athletes use music to get psyched up for a big game. But why does music have the power to inspire, motivate, and make us cry? Marty Music finds out how music makes us move.

programme.title: Science of Sound
programme.desc: It's easy to love live music. Whether you're jamming with some friends or you're lost in the crowd at an amazing show, live music really moves us. But why does it feel so much better than listening to music on the best home stereo?

programme.title: Science of Sound
programme.desc: It's no surprise that trained musicians experience music differently than others. Sure, musicians can hear and recognize similar chords or melodies across different songs, but is that all?

programme.title: TechKnow
programme.desc: Techknow looks at innovative solutions for accessibility and assistive technology to help persons with disabilities.

programme.title: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The first phase of this journey is complete, now commences the second, with robotics, advanced technologies and sheer daring we are now going where before we only dreamt.

programme.title: The New Frontier
programme.desc: Few have walked on the moon's surface, though her allure remains strong, once again we are glancing her way with renewed interest and with a view to return very soon.

programme.title: The New Frontier
programme.desc: Venus the first and brightest star in the evening sky, and Mercury fleeting across the solar disk. As we begin to take a closer look at our companions they are posing more questions than answers.

programme.title: Zenith: Advances in Space Exploration
programme.desc: This episode examines a range of launchers that are integral to space research.

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: Antarctica is a mysterious and unexplored continent. Thanks to the Chilean Antarctic Institute and the research center Dynamics of Marine Ecosystems of High Altitudes, scientists are suffering the extreme temperatures to study climate change.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: Great white sharks are one of the most feared predators on Earth, and yet we know very little about them. Science is now revealing the mysteries of this perfect predator through evolutionary biology.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: How long does it take for life to rebound after a major mass extiction? Scientists in Svalbard dig through fossil clues for surprising revelations abour our Earth's history.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli explores the robots that are changing the way we explore space - and helping people on earth.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli assembles an investigative team to tackle one of the biggest questions of our time: Are we alone?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction?
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be testing the effectiveness of driving a vehicle with fully automatic machine guns mounted to the car! Just like 007 did with his Aston Martin DB5.

programme.title: Python Hunters
programme.desc: The Python Hunters decide to tackle the debate over how the Burmese Pythons came to be established in the Everglades.

programme.title: Python Hunters
programme.desc: A cold snap has hit the state of Florida and frigid temperatures are killing thousands of native and non-indigenous animals of all species. Has Mother Nature solved their python problem?

programme.title: Python Hunters
programme.desc: The Florida Everglades are home to thousands of invasive plant, insect and animal species and yet the Burmese Python is perceived as the biggest concern. Are they a problem or is this snake hysteria?

programme.title: Wild About
programme.desc: Many of the larger breeds of raptors are now endangered or vulnerable, particularly eagles, vultures and larger owls as they require large, specialized habitats. Though they may be soaring high now, the future doesn't bode well for the great raptors.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Drew and Agatha have to deal with a dog with a broken leg brought in by a group of youngsters with no money.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV takes a Bull Shark diving trip off the Florida Coast, dives with Hammerhead Sharks in the Bahamas and takes a Deeper Dive studying Great Hammerhead Sharks.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with Whale Sharks in Mexico, explores a shark hunting ritual 300 Miles off the coast of Costa Rica, and takes a Deeper Dive studying shark attacks, Whitetip Reef Sharks and Oceanic White Tip Sharks.

programme.title: Doug to the Rescue
programme.desc: Doug Thron is not your ordinary drone pilot. Using an infrared camera strapped onto his drone, he travels to the heart of disaster zones, locating and rescuing the animals who have been left behind.

programme.title: Doug to the Rescue

programme.title: The Trinity Cathedral, Saint Petersburg, Russia
programme.desc: Spread out on the coast of the Gulf of Finland, at the mouth of the Neva River, St. Petersburg is the second-largest city in Russia. Witness of both military and civil history, the Trinity Cathedral of Izmailovsky, part of the historic center of St. Peter"&"sburg is a world heritage site.

programme.title: Novi Sad Synagogue, Serbia
programme.desc: Right in the city center of Novi Sad, Serbia, this crucial area, on Jevrejska Street – literally, Jewish Street - the synagogue of Novi Sad occupies a prominent spot both geographically as well as in the historical annals of the city.

programme.title: Mar Elias Monastery
programme.desc: Mar Elias monastery lies on the side of the road from Jerusalem and Bethlehem. It is maintained by the Greek-Orthodox church, and by local tradition Elijah rested here while fleeing from Queen Jezebel

programme.title: City of Venice, Italy (Part 2)
programme.desc: Celebrated throughout the world for its singular beauty, discover Venice and some of its famous places. An open-air museum that seems to float on its lagoon, and a World Heritage Site.

programme.title: Village Baduy, Indonesia
programme.desc: The Baduy village is in a remote area on the slopes of the Kendeng Mountains, surrounded by a verdant atmosphere. It retains the ancient cultural values and still maintains its traditional style while rejecting the technology that has changed everything.

programme.title: Sifnos, Cyclades island, Greece
programme.desc: An elegant island, symbolic of the Cyclades, discover the Greek island of Sifnos, full of contrasts, where the most arid mountains rub shoulders with the greenest valleys, and where monasteries dominate sandy beaches.

programme.title: Vannes Old City, France
programme.desc: Old City Walls of Vannes are fortifications built between the 3rd and 17th centuries to protect Vannes' city. It is located on the Gulf of Morbihan at the mouth of two rivers, the Marle and the Vincin, around 450 km southwest of Paris. These ancient city walls are some of the best-preserved in the country.

programme.title: Tallinn town, Estonia
programme.desc: Entering now in the Old Town of Tallinn, we understand how it became the best-preserved medieval city in Northern Europe, boasting Gothic spires, winding cobblestone streets, and enchanting architecture.Tallinn, the capital of Estonia, is a city out of a fairytale with centuries of history and traditions.

programme.title: Church of Nativity, Israel
programme.desc: The Church of The Nativity is situated in Betlehem to the south of Jerusalem.In 327 the church of Nativity was commissioned by Constantine the Great and his mother Helena over the site that was traditionally considered to be located over the cave that mar"&"ks the birthplace of Jesus…

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Sveti Đorđe Island is one of the two islets off the coast of Perast in the Bay of Kotor, Montenegro. Unlike Gospa od Škrpjela, it is a natural island.

programme.title: Tauric Chersonesos, Crimea
programme.desc: 528 BC. in the west of the Heracles Peninsula, the Dorian Greeks founded the city of Chersonesus in Crimea, which means "peninsula". Founded as a colony of the wealthy Greek city of Heraclea of Pontus, its history is part of the Ancient Greece, Ancient Rome and Byzantium. In the Middle Ages, Chersonesus was called Kherson.

programme.title: The Good Samaritan Museum, Israel Part 2
programme.desc: On the road from Jerusalem to the Dead Sea, discover the Good Samaritain Museum, an archaeological and historical site. This museum, which is the only mosaic museum in the country and one of only three in the world, has artefacts which were unearthed in J"&"udea, Samaria and Gaza on display. You are in the area of Ma'ale Adumim (Red Heights), on the same road that pilgrims used to take on their way to Jerusalem, particularly those coming from the Galilee via the Jordan Valley and Jericho, in the footsteps of"&" Jesus and John the Baptist…

programme.title: Pskov City, Russia
programme.desc: Pskov: One of the most beautiful and ancient cities located in the north-west of Russia on the Velikaya River! Only 20 kilometers from the Estonian border, church-studded city Pskov is dominated by its mighty riverside Kremlin: an enormous bulwark that ha"&"s faced up to its fair share of invading armies down the centuries.

programme.title: Carloforte Old Town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: Approximately 7 kilometers off the Southwestern Coast of Sardinia, there is an Island with rugged cliffs, no rivers, and a coastline full of beautiful coves. This is San Pietro. On this Island, only one town: Carloforte. It is an Italian village in Southe"&"rn Sardinia, as well as an honorary city of Genoa.

programme.title: HOTELS in the Baleares: Mallorca
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Barcelona in Spain.

programme.title: Saschiz Old Town, Romania
programme.desc: Saschiz, village, and commune, Mureș județ county is located in central Romania. The villages of Saschiz, Mihai Viteazu, and Cloașterf make up the larger commune of Saschiz. Located in the old region of Transylvania, it lies about 20 km east of Sighișoara"&". First documented in the 14th century, Saschiz is known for its medieval fortress and church constructed by Transylvanian Saxons, a German speaker. They settled in Transylvania when it was part of Hungary. The ruins of the 14th-century fortress sit atop "&"a hill overlooking the village. The late 15th-century fortified church has Gothic details and an imposing clock tower. Along with five other villages with fortified churches, Saschiz was inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage sites in 1999.
